Create a masked input widget

Source: R/widgets-input.R
masked_input.Rd

Template uses special characters: A (letter), 9 (digit), ! (force upper), > (force upper following), < (force lower following). Other characters are literal separators. Example: "999-999-9999" for phone, "AA99 AA" for UK postcode.

Usage

masked_input(
  template,
  value = NULL,
  placeholder = "",
  id = NULL,
  classes = NULL
)

Arguments

template

Template string defining the input mask.

value

Initial value (or NULL).

placeholder

Placeholder text.

id

Optional widget id.

classes

Optional CSS classes (character vector).

Value

An rtui_spec list.
